researchNotes: Pickleheads' own numbers don't fully reconcile. The 7 venues clearly and solely listed under /california/oakland/ (Montclair, Bushrod, Pickle Athletics, De Fremery, Oakland Hills Tennis Club, Meyer Tennis Courts, Sheffield Village) sum to exactly 27 courts on their own, matching the stated 'M courts' total with no room left for an 8th location's courts. The apparent 8th 'Oakland' listing, Hampton Tennis Court - Piedmont, is physically addressed in Piedmont, CA (a separate incorporated city enclosed by Oakland) and is also independently listed under Pickleheads' own /california/piedmont/ page. It's included below (matchStatus 'new', confirmed: false) because Pickleheads' search index does surface it under an /oakland/ URL, but a human should decide whether it belongs in this city's directory at all. Surface-type breakdown Pickleheads gives ('5 hard, 2 concrete, 1 acrylic' = 8 locations) doesn't cleanly reconcile with the 7-location/27-court reading either (only 1 concrete location, Meyer, was confirmed; Sheffield's surface material was never explicitly stated by any source). Flagging rather than guessing.

venues.name: Montclair Pickleball Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor hard courts — dedicated, permanent lines and nets
venues.weather: Mild-to-warm East Bay flatland/hills, occasional fog near the bay side
venues.notes: Court count (4) and Outdoor status corroborate existing data with no issue. Pickleheads states the courts are free with reservations available, directly contradicting the existing '~$10/hr for residents' fee — left as a conflict for human review rather than picking a side.

venues.name: Bushrod Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard courts, permanent lines; bring your own net
venues.weather: Mild-to-warm East Bay flatland, occasional fog near the bay side
venues.notes: Court count (4) fills a previously-null value, no conflict there. Pickleheads describes general open play as free; existing record's '$2 drop-in fee' may specifically apply to the scheduled/organized sessions noted in that same record rather than all play — plausible both are true, but recorded as a conflict per instructions since it contradicts a non-null existing field.

venues.name: Pickle Athletics
venues.surface: Indoor, cushioned acrylic, dedicated with permanent lines and nets
venues.notes: Court count (4) and Indoor status corroborate existing data. Pickleheads explicitly and repeatedly (confirmed via two separate searches) states courts cannot be reserved, contradicting the existing 'Reservable' status and its book.pickleathletics.com booking URL — possible explanation is that the existing booking link is for membership/class signup rather than ad-hoc court reservation, but left as an unresolved conflict. Price field newly filled from 'Not specified' to 'one-time fee required.'

venues.name: De Fremery Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court, lines overlaid on a tennis court (net is taller than standard pickleball height)
venues.netType: Tennis-court net (taller than standard pickleball net)
venues.weather: Mild-to-warm East Bay flatland, occasional fog near the bay side
venues.notes: Fills several previously 'Not specified'/null fields: court count (1), surface, reservable status, and booking URL (matches the same cityofoakland.perfectmind.com system used by Bushrod and Montclair). No conflicts with existing data — price 'Free' matches exactly.

venues.name: Oakland Hills Tennis Club
venues.surface: Outdoor hard courts, dedicated with permanent lines and nets
venues.weather: Mild-to-warm East Bay flatland/hills, occasional fog near the bay side
venues.notes: Court count (8) matches existing exactly — no conflict. Fills reservable status and an amenities list, both previously unspecified. Price left 'Not specified' here since Pickleheads didn't restate the membership fee structure the existing record already details.

venues.name: Meyer Tennis Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor concrete, permanent lines, portable nets
venues.weather: Mild-to-warm East Bay flatland, occasional fog near the bay side
venues.notes: New venue, no existing baseline match. Located on the Mills College at Northeastern University campus (formerly Mills College); membership required to play. Hours sourced from the facility's own operator page, not Pickleheads directly, since Pickleheads didn't restate hours in available search results. Exact lat/lon not confirmed — left null with approxLocation flag rather than guessing a pin.

venues.name: Sheffield Village Tennis Court
venues.weather: Mild-to-warm East Bay flatland/hills, occasional fog near the bay side
venues.notes: New venue, no existing baseline match. Court count (2), free/no-reservation status corroborated by Pickleheads directly. Address corroborated by two independent secondary aggregators (Pickleballify, California Pickleball Association) that mirror the same Pickleheads listing. Surface material never explicitly stated by any source — left 'Not specified' rather than assuming it matches the city's dominant 'hard court' surface type.

venues.name: Hampton Tennis Court - Piedmont
venues.address: Hampton Rd & La Salle Ave, Piedmont, CA 94611
venues.weather: Mild-to-warm East Bay flatland/hills, occasional fog near the bay side
venues.notes: JURISDICTION FLAG, not a data conflict: this venue's real, physical address is in Piedmont, CA — a separate incorporated city entirely enclosed by Oakland, with its own City Rec Dept (contact (510) 420-3070) and its own Pickleheads city page. Pickleheads cross-lists this same venue under BOTH /california/oakland/hampton-courts and /california/piedmont/hampton-tennis-court-piedmont (confirmed via two independent searches hitting each URL directly). Included here only because it surfaces under Oakland's URL path and appears to be folded into Oakland's stated 8-location count. See top-level researchNotes: excluding this venue makes the other 7 Oakland venues' court counts sum to exactly Pickleheads' stated 27-court total, while including it would push the sum to 31 — a human should decide whether this venue belongs in Oakland's directory, Piedmont's, or both. lat/lon are a street-level geocode of Hampton Rd, not a confirmed venue pin.
